backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the DCS Tech Inventory Management app, defining data types and state for users, inventory items, and adjustment logs, along with shared functions for user approval, profile management, inventory CRUD, bulk import, and adjustment logging.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping the CSV import feature (AdminPanel CSV upload, client-side validation, bulk import, results summary) to its implementing files and associated test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing short summaries of three frontend files: the React Query hooks file, the CsvImportSection component, and the AdminPanel page.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind base/components/utilities and defines light and dark mode CSS custom properties for the design system (colors, radius, sidebar, charts).
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the React app, setting the page title to 'DCS Tech Inventory Management' and mounting the app via the root div and main.tsx module script.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that configures TanStack Router with protected and public routes, handles Internet Identity authentication, triggers registerOrLogin on actor availability, and conditionally renders loading states, the login page, profile setup modal, or the main layout.
frontend/src/components/AddItemModal.tsx: Modal dialog component for adding a new inventory item, containing a scrollable form with fields for name, SKU, category, unit, quantity, threshold, price, supplier, barcode, and description, which submits via the useAddInventoryItem mutation.
frontend/src/components/CsvImportSection: Self-contained CSV import UI component that handles drag-and-drop file selection, client-side CSV parsing and row validation (required fields, numeric checks), displays a parse preview with valid/skipped counts, and triggers the bulkImportInventory backend call with a post-import results summary.
frontend/src/components/InventoryItemDet: A dialog component that displays detailed information about an inventory item, including stock status, and allows authorized users (admin/staff) to add or remove stock with notes, while also showing a filtered adjustment history log.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: The main application shell component providing a responsive sidebar navigation with role-based menu items, a theme toggle, and a user dropdown with sign-out functionality.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: A blocking modal dialog that prompts new users to enter their name and email to create a profile before accessing the application.
frontend/src/components/ThemeToggle.tsx: A small icon button component that toggles between light and dark themes using the useTheme hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using the current Internet Identity, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status via a React context and hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes all React Query hooks for the application, covering user profile, inventory items, inventory adjustments, and adjustment logs, with toast notifications for mutation outcomes.
frontend/src/hooks/useTheme.ts: A thin wrapper around next-themes' useTheme that exposes a boolean isDark flag and a toggle function for switching between light and dark modes.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that sets up Tailwind CSS, imports Inter and Space Grotesk fonts, and defines light/dark mode CSS custom properties for the design system including colors, sidebar, and chart tokens.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that mounts the root component wrapped with TanStack Query's QueryClientProvider and a custom InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPanel.tsx: Admin-only page for managing users (view, approve, reject, delete, change roles) and seeding demo data, with tabbed UI including a CSV import section; access is restricted to users with the admin role.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Main dashboard page displaying summary stat cards (total items, low stock, users, activity) and a recent adjustment log feed, with navigation shortcuts to filtered inventory views.
frontend/src/pages/Inventory.tsx: Inventory list page with search, stock-level filtering, and a data table; supports URL-param-driven pre-filtering and opens an item detail panel or add-item modal based on user role.
frontend/src/pages/Login.tsx: Login page that authenticates users via Internet Identity, redirects already-authenticated users to the dashboard, and displays feature highlights and a theme toggle.
frontend/src/pages/Reports.tsx: Reports page (staff/admin only) showing a filterable, date-range-searchable table of inventory adjustment logs sorted by most recent.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utility functions for reading URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, persisting them in sessionStorage, and cleaning sensitive params from the URL bar without a page reload.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration that sets up dark mode, custom OKLCH-based color tokens, typography/container-queries/animate plugins, and extended theme values like fonts, shadows, and border radii.
project_state.json: Tracks the DCS Tech Inventory project's state at version 3, recording existing features (client-side CSV import in AdminPanel) and pending feature requests for a backend `bulkImportInventory` function with create/update/skip logic.
